sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55123" key="kataskafh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατασκᾰφ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n55123.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dug down</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κ. οἴκησις</foreign> the <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deep-dug</tr_> dwelling, i. e. the grave, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg002.perseus-grc1:891" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">891</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
